data.title: Charter Next Generation Appoints Mark Howell as Executive Vice President of Sales to Accelerate Commercial Strategy and Growth
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Charter Next Generation (CNG), a prominent material science company focusing on specialty films and sustainable solutions, revealed the selection of Mark Howell as the new Executive Vice President of Sales. Howell will be spearheading CNG's sales division, bringing his expertise to drive growth and expansion in the company's market reach.

data.title: Cvent Closes Acquisition of ON24
data.description: Tysons, Virginia - Cvent has expanded its event management platform by integrating ON24's enterprise-grade webinar platform and AI-powered intelligent engagement features.

data.title: Leaf & Mineral™ Celebrates National Cleaning Week with Focus on Innovative Cleaning Solutions
data.description: A detergent brand focused on results is changing the way households clean with plant- and mineral-based products. In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on April 1, 2026, Leaf & Mineral™ announced its participation in National Cleaning Week, held in late March. The brand is highlighting the importance of clean living during this time.

data.title: Noble Gold Investments Provides Tips to Turn Your Tax Return into Lasting Wealth
data.description: Taxpayers across the nation are anticipating bigger tax refunds this year, as per IRS data. The average tax refund is expected to increase by approximately 10% compared to the previous year. This provides a valuable chance to enhance long-term financial security and independence.

data.title: Halifax Humane Society Launches "Neuter Scooter for a Nickel" to Celebrate 90 Years of Lifesaving Impact
data.description: From April 1 to June 30, male cat neuter surgeries are being offered for a mere 5 cents in Daytona Beach, Florida. The Halifax Humane Society has launched the "Neuter Scooter for a Nickel" campaign to tackle pet overpopulation. This initiative aims to provide low-cost neuter services to address the issue effectively.

data.title: Vetology Expands Public AI Validation Dashboard to 11 Metrics Per Classifier, Commits to Ongoing Model Retraining
data.description: One company has released comprehensive statistical profiles for over 89 classifiers, emphasizing that creating AI is just a portion of the overall task. Located in San Diego, the announcement was made on April 1, 2026. Vetology, a leader in AI-driven radiology screening reports and veterinary teleradiology services overseen by board-certified professionals, has broadened its offerings.

data.title: Cannabix Technologies Announces Delivery of Marijuana Breath Test (MBT) to Virginia based Industrial Manufacturing Client
data.description: Cannabix Technologies Inc., a developer of marijuana and alcohol breath testing devices for workplace safety and law enforcement, has recently announced the commercial delivery of its Marijuana Breath Test (“MBT”) products to a prominent industrial manufacturing company in Virginia. This delivery was facilitated through an authorized reseller. The company, traded as CSE: BLO, OTCID: BLOZF, and Frankfurt: 8CT, emphasized the growing adoption of its non-invasive breath-based testing products in various industries to enhance workplace safety. The delivery signifies a significant milestone for Cannabix as it expands its market presence and penetration, catering to the increasing demand for reliable testing solutions.

data.title: Senti Biosciences Announces Publication in Cell Systems Demonstrating Advanced Logic-Gated CAR Design for Cell Therapies
data.description: Today, in South San Francisco, California, Senti Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNTI) revealed groundbreaking research showcasing its innovative approach in developing next-gen cell and gene therapies. The study, published in Cell Systems, introduces a novel framework for constructing NOT-gated chimeric antigen receptor (CAR) circuits in T cells and natural killer (NK) cells. By utilizing Logic-Gated receptor designs, the research highlights the enhanced effectiveness, accuracy, and safety of cell therapies. This advancement allows immune cells to target and eliminate tumor cells while preserving healthy tissue. The recent publication supplements Senti's prior disclosures on encouraging clinical results of their Logic-Gated SENTI-202 product for relapsed/refractory Acute Myeloid Leukemia, discussed at the 2025 American Society for Hematology Annual Meeting.

data.title: Nike, Virgin Galactic, Bitfarms and More Stocks With Earnings This Week
data.description: This week on March 30, 2026, it is a holiday-shortened week marking the end of the first quarter of 2026. Key events include: Rezolve AI Plc (NASDAQ: RZLV) reporting fiscal year results before Monday's opening bell. Virgin Galactic Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SPCE), led by Richard Branson, is set to release Q4 results after Monday's close, with analysts expecting a loss of -$1.03 per share. Investors will closely monitor cash burn, commercial flight expansion plans, and operating losses. Full details are on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Huskeys Exits Stealth as the First to Modernize Existing Legacy WAFs with Agentic AI
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, Huskeys, an Edge Security Management (ESM) firm, has recently come out of stealth mode. They have secured $8 million in seed funding to address the longstanding issue of inadequate web application security. The current reliance on outdated technologies has left a gap in connectivity, context, and automation needed to adapt to modern dynamic environments. Today, web traffic has transitioned from human interaction to APIs and automated agents, underscoring the urgency for innovative solutions in cybersecurity.
